title: Tome V Act 10: The Holon Hitchhikers

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 10: The Holon Hitchhikers
**act** · shared · narrative

Vagari composes paratimes; the whole is the sum of its wholes.
> *The whole is the sum of its wholes. The hitchhiker carries the whole between oases.*
